title: [Docs] Deduplicate `--filter` Description
body: Refactor `--filter` descriptions to use a single source of truth. Currently, the text is repeated in multiple docs; deduplicating it will improve maintainability.

comments.body: I'm interested in working on this issue. Could you provide more context about what you're looking for? Any additional details about requirements or constraints would be helpful.
A PR has already been created to address this issue. It looks like it's in good shape, but feel free to review it.
